title: Bare Bones x Fresh Food
description: Bare Bones textures for Fresh Food ! 🍎
body:
![Bare Bones x Fresh Food logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d3994bee95acf4e3778bc1899583b80a2ac3ccbb.png)

-----------------------------------

This resource pack adds Bare Bones textures to [Fresh Food](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-food) !

You have to place it above the default Fresh Food in the resource pack list

- [Bare Bones x Mods](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones-x-mods) is available ! It's a more convenient way to use my packs
